'''âh-ch-ch-n''' ('''kahachchenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quinquesect|quinquesect]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-ch-ch-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quinquesect|quinquesect]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-ch-ch-n
|-
! Lemma
| kahachchenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihachchenoko|thihachchenoko]] || [[word:jihachchenoko|jihachchenoko]] || [[word:shihachchenoko|shihachchenoko]] || [[word:kihachchenoko|kihachchenoko]]
|-
